notes: Derived from the verb 'verzieren' (to decorate). Often used in contexts of art, architecture, baking, and music (ornaments/trills).

sentences.german: Die Torte hat wunderschöne Verzierungen aus Zuckerguss.
sentences.english: The cake has beautiful decorations made of icing.

sentences.german: Die Verzierungen an der alten Kirche sind sehr kunstvoll.
sentences.english: The ornaments on the old church are very artistic.
